verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Drinking at the springs of living water, Happy now am I, my soul they satisfy; Drinking at the springs of living water, Oh wonderful and bountiful supply.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh sinner, won't you come today to Calvary? A fountain there is flowing deep and wide; The Saviour now invites you to the water free, Where thirsting spirits can be satisfied.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: How sweet the living water from the hills of God, It makes me glad and happy all the way; Now glory, grace and blessing mark the path I've trod, I'm shouting Hallelujah every day.
